title: Subtask creation ergonomics
description: Vikunja has no first-class subtask resource (see src/tools/tasks/subtasks.ts's header) -- a subtask is a task-relation under the hood. Probes whether the agent finds create-subtask rather than manually wiring a raw task relation.
promptTemplate: Create a project called "{{prefix}}Launch Plan" with one task called "{{prefix}}Prepare launch". Break that task down into 3 subtasks: "{{prefix}}Write docs", "{{prefix}}Record demo", and "{{prefix}}Notify customers".
